publishedAbstract: All pods are running fine, but `heketi-storage` keeps failing on *BackOff* error. ~~~ Readiness probe failed: Get http://10.1.0.0:8080/hello: dial tcp 10.1.0.0:8080: connect: connection refused Liveness probe failed: Get http://10.1.0.0:8080/hello: dial tcp 10.1.0.0:8080: connect: connection refused spec.containers{heketi} Warning BackOff kubelet, node.example.com Back-off restarting failed container ~~~ ~~~ NAME READY STATUS RESTARTS AGE glusterfs-storage-j8f5z 1/1 Running 0 25d glusterfs-storage-s9z5w 1/1 Running 0 25d glusterfs-storage-w5b5w 1/1 Running 0 26d heketi-storage-1-wrhjx 0/1 Running 31 1h ~~~
publishedTitle: Heketi-storage pod crashing with Readiness probe failed on OCP 3.11
